title: Adventure in Elysium
description: Well optimized modpack trying to get the most fun playing it possible.
body:
# Adventure in Elysium
## World generation
- World is generated with use of [William Wythers' Overhauled Overworld](https://modrinth.com/mod/wwoo), [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone), [Promenade](https://modrinth.com/mod/promenade), [Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored).

## Dimensions 
- Nether is changed with [BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether) and [Incendium](https://modrinth.com/datapack/incendium).
- End is only changed with [BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend).
- And new dimension [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether).
- And second new dimension is from mod [Deeper and Darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker)

## Combat and weapons
- New weapons added by [MedievalWeapons](https://modrinth.com/mod/medievalweapons).
- Combat mechanic from [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat).
- New armours from [Advanced Netherite](https://modrinth.com/mod/advanced-netherite) and [Enhanced Turtle Items (ETI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/eti).
